attachment.description: The GeoJSON file itself as an attachment.

feature-count.description: Number of Feature elements in the GeoJSON FeatureCollection.

geometry-types.description: Geometry types present in the GeoJSON file.

max-latitude.description: Maximum latitude of the GeoJSON bounding box in WGS84.

max-longitude.description: Maximum longitude of the GeoJSON bounding box in WGS84.

md5.description: MD5 hash of the GeoJSON file.

mime-type.description: MIME type of the file, typically application/geo+json.

min-latitude.description: Minimum latitude of the GeoJSON bounding box in WGS84.

min-longitude.description: Minimum longitude of the GeoJSON bounding box in WGS84.

sha1.description: SHA1 hash of the GeoJSON file.

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the GeoJSON file.

size-in-bytes.description: Size of the GeoJSON file in bytes.

text.description: Free text comment or analyst note about the GeoJSON file.

description: An object to describe a GeoJSON file containing geographic data structures such as points, lines, and polygons as defined in RFC 7946.
name: geojson
